basic_details.job_title: CSMCRI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate-I / Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Central Salt & Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSMCRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Salt & Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSMCRI) Project Associate-I / Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CSMCRI. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the CSMCRI Project Associate-I / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per the government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Botany/Biotechnology, Master's in Marine Science/Marine Biology/Marine Biotechnology/Oceanography, SSC/10th + ITI in Fitter/COPA
qualification.details: Project Associate-I (PAT-I): M.Sc. Botany/Biotechnology from a recognized University. Project Associate-I (PAT-I): Master's/Integrated Masters in Marine Science/Marine Biology/Marine Biotechnology/Oceanography/Marine Biotechnology/Biotechnology/Microbiology/CLT Botany/Plant Biology/Biochemistry/Zoology/Fisheries Science/Aquaculture/Environmental Science or Bachelor's Degree in Technology in Biotechnology from a recognized university. Project Assistant (PA-I): SSC/10th plus ITI in Fitter, Computer Operator and Programming Assistant (COPA).

salary_details.details: Project Associate-I (PAT-I): Rs. 31000+HRA or Rs. 25000+HRA per month. Project Assistant (PA-I): Rs. 18000+HRA per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CSMCRI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.central_salt_marine_chemicals_research_i: M.Sc. Botany/Biotechnology, Master's in Marine Science/Marine Biology/Marine Biotechnology/Oceanography, SSC/10th + ITI in Fitter/COPA

content_sections.heading: CSMCRI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSMCRI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSMCRI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSMCRI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I (PAT-I): M.Sc. Botany/Biotechnology from a recognized University. Project Associate-I (PAT-I): Master's/Integrated Masters in Marine Science/Marine Biology/Marine Biotechnology/Oceanography/Marine Biotechnology/Biotechnology/Microbiology/CLT Botany/Plant Biology/Biochemistry/Zoology/Fisheries Science/Aquaculture/Environmental Science or Bachelor's Degree in Technology in Biotechnology from a recognized university. Project Assistant (PA-I): SSC/10th plus ITI in Fitter, Computer Operator and Programming Assistant (COPA).

content_sections.heading: CSMCRI Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per the government norms.

content_sections.heading: CSMCRI Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I (PAT-I): Rs. 31000+HRA or Rs. 25000+HRA per month. Project Assistant (PA-I): Rs. 18000+HRA per month.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CSMCRI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSMCRI recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the CSMCRI Project Associate-I / Project Assistant posts is 30th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the CSMCRI recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Project Associate-I and Project Assistant positions at CSMCRI.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: For Project Associate-I, candidates need an M.Sc. in Botany/Biotechnology or a Master's degree in Marine Science/Marine Biology/Marine Biotechnology/Oceanography from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: For Project Assistant posts, candidates must have completed SSC/10th grade along with an ITI certificate in Fitter or Computer Operator and Programming Assistant (COPA).

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the CSMCRI recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: Project Associate-I posts offer a salary of Rs. 31000+HRA or Rs. 25000+HRA per month, while Project Assistant posts offer Rs. 18000+HRA per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for CSMCRI recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the CSMCRI recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for these posts will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. How should candidates apply for these CSMCRI vacancies?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their complete application via email to the designated email address before the closing date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for CSMCRI recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct link to the PDF is provided.
